name: COLUMBUS MCKINNON CORP
business: Columbus McKinnon is a leading worldwide designer, manufacturer and marketer of intelligent motion solutions for material handling, including hoists, crane components, precision conveyor systems, rigging tools, light rail workstations, and digital power and motion control systems. The company sells to commercial and industrial applications requiring safety, reliability, and quality. Key products are used in mission critical applications across various industries.
sellsTo: transportation including electric vehicle (EV) production and aerospace
government agencies (e.g., U.S. and Canadian Navies and Coast Guards)

tamClaims.sentence: Our products include a broad variety of offerings for customers, including hoists, crane components, precision conveyor systems, rigging tools, light rail workstations and digital power and motion control systems in a $35 billion Total Addressable Market (TAM).
